notifications_intro: Choose how and when you want to be notified.
privacy_intro: Control what other users can see from your profile and activity.
advanced_intro: Advanced controls for data, experiments and connected services.

notifications_items.pushNotifications_desc: Enable in-app and browser push alerts.
notifications_items.newFollowerAlert_desc: Get notified when someone follows you.
notifications_items.weeklyReport_desc: Optional digest with your weekly stats.

privacy_items.showLikes_desc: Display liked photos on your public profile.
privacy_items.hideCollections_desc: Hide your collections from public view.
privacy_items.appearInSearch_desc: Allow your profile and photos to be indexed.

advanced_items.betaFeatures_desc: Try upcoming features before general release.
